Name: Special Ops- S02
Review:
KK menon delivers as always. 1st episode was so good and the final episode feels so rushed, like they run out of budget for 1 more episode.
That jignesh dholakiya subplot..?? Total fillers.
Villain..? Nowhere near ikhlaq khan's league.
Visually stunning through, every 15 min we are in a new country with drone shots.

Name: The Boys: The Finale
Review: It all starts with robin and ends with robin. Maybe the finale wasn’t perfect, maybe it was a bit mid… but the journey? Bloody unforgettable...🔥🔥🔥 Through all the chaos, gore, madness, and heartbreak, this show gave us one hell of a ride. I’m gonna miss these absolute cunts. OI, FUCK OFF, YOU CUNTS..
